feed.title: SAP Community - SAP NetWeaver
feed.subtitle: SAP NetWeaver Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Forcing a Refresh of M_TABLE_PERSISTENCE_STATISTICS Statistics
entry.content:
Good Afternoon,

I have purged a table named ZEXAMPLE stored in SAPHANADB.

I check the disk size of this table with the following query:
SQL> select TABLE_NAME, DISK_SIZE from M_TABLE_PERSISTENCE_STATISTICS where SCHEMA_NAME='SAPHANADB' and TABLE_NAME='ZEXAMPLE';

But this query returns an old value, that does not take into account my deletions.

1. Would you know which Hana Job refreshes the table sizes statistics ?

2. How could I force a refresh of the M_TABLE_PERSISTENCE_STATISTICS for the table SAPHANADB.ZEXAMPLE ?

3. How could I force a refresh of the statistics for the tables that belong to the Schema SAPHANADB ?

Have a nice day.

entry.title: Integrate OKTA SSO using SAML2.0 in SAP NW 7.5
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We want to integrate OKTA SSO using SAML2.0 in SAP Netweaver 7.5 . Can someone please outline all steps involved to perform the same ?

entry.title: What kind of events do the Audit Classes record in the Security Audit Log?
entry.content:
I can view the audit log in SM20, and there are eight audit classes displayed on the screen. These audit classes are used to filter the logs, but what do they all mean? In particular, what kind of logs are output to 'System Events'?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Slow message processing sometimes - NAST
entry.content:
Hello guys,

our problem is that message processing is sometimes slow.

Most messages are fast proceeded like 0-1 second.
But then there are messages again and again, slow messages with 10 seconds, 1-2 minute, or more.
For example this is delaying printing for minutes.

Time span between ERUHR and UHRVR (table NAST).
Independent from media (print, mail, idoc), sendoption = 4 (direct sending).

In SQL cache the response time for queries to NAST are only milliseconds.
There is also no bottleneck for workprocesses.

do you have any recommendations where to analyze?

Thank you

entry.title: 3537476 KRNL 753 PL 1436
entry.content:
Does SAP Kernel 753PL1436 addresses the vulnerabilities of SAP Note 3537476?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Custom Adapter Module with Build Path External JAR
entry.content:
Hello experts,

My scenario:

Development Infrastructure
  Software Component
    Development Component
      EAR (Referenced Projects: My EJB localdevelopment)
      EJB

The custom module logic (validating the XML before it is processed) was created separately and was added as an external JAR in the EJB localdevelopment Project.

My current module class dont have compilation Errors (Syntax Errors) but Build errors when Build gets executed.

The error import classes are those from my external JAR:

As far as I have been able to find out, setting the Build Path is not enough.

Im not sure but Im think there are 2 ways to resolve this: 

- Create an External Library project:

Source: Using External Libraries for Development with NWDI 

The above approach Using Exteral Libraries I think need to be linked with the Deployment descriptors.

Deployment descriptors 

- I found another resource Referencing an External JAR File

Source: Referencing an External JAR

Questions:

Is this the only way to handle external libraries in an EJB or is there another way that is easier?

The following post make references in the application-j2ee-engine.xsd but I don't see that the person have created an External Library DC:

How to create SAP PI adapter modules in EJB 3.0 

What exactly should I do? So far, beyond referencing the EJB in the EAR at the time I create it, do I need to do anything else?

I have done the research, but I see different procedures, can someone help me decide how to achieve this?

Thanks.

entry.title: Does SAP support MSSQL as a target database for SLT when the SLT system is running on Linux?
entry.content:
Hello SAP

 

Does SAP support MSSQL as a target database for SLT when the SLT system is running on Linux?

 

SLT version is "SAP LT REPLICATION SERVER 3.0" which is running on NetWeaver 7.52 SP 12 with Linux OS.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Issue in SAP Web Dispatcher -
entry.content:
We currently have an SAP web dispatcher in our setup that directs traffic from the enterprise portal to the backend systems.
Although SSL is configured on all these hosts, we are experiencing inconsistencies where requests to the backend are occasionally sent using HTTP instead of HTTPS.
We would like to ensure that all requests are consistently sent over HTTPS.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: BW-IP mit BW/4HANA
entry.content:
In wie fern ist BW-IP unter BW/4HANA noch nutzbar? Leider finde ich keine konkreten bzw. offiziellen Informationen dazu. Aus diversen SAP-Blogeinträgen konnte ich zwar die Info entnehmen, dass BW-IP unter BW/4 technisch funktioniert, es aber im Gegensatz früheren BW-Versionen zur Nutzung eine BPC-Lizenz braucht.

Ich bin nun auf der Suche nach einem offiziellen Dokument (Roadmap, PAM, Hinweis oder Dokumentation), auf welches ich verweisen kann.

entry.title: 0FI_AR_9 is Not Whitelisted. What is the Alternate?
entry.content:
Hi,

 

We"re migrating to S/4 and datasource 0FI_AR_9 wouldn"t be working in S/4. Please provide an alternate to this datasource.

Thanks,

Shilpi

entry.title: SAPup process exited with status 20 while launching SUM
entry.content:
Hi 

we are working on SAP_UI component upgrade from 740 SP19 to 754 SP12. All required media files are downloaded from maintenance planner. But after lunching SUM  we are facing "SAPUP process exited with status 20".

entry.title: How to regenerate the system certificates in sap po 7.5?
entry.content:
Hi Team,
Good day!

We have a SAP standard system certificate expiring on March 17th, in SAP PO Quality and Production.

Please can you provide new certificate to renew it timely for avoiding any disconnections. Kindly provide us the procedure to update the certificates. in SAP PO landscape.

Thanks & Regards
Gopi


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: How to check when the last execution of a transaction took place
entry.content:
There is a need to know how to find the last execution of a specific transaction code in the system.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

entry.title: Problem in SUM - PREP_INPUT_CHECK/READDATA_EXP - Upgrade SAP BW System
entry.content:
Hello Support,

we want to upgrade our SAP BW System T02 to Netweaver 750 and current sp-Stack - see attached Screenshot.

In SUM we got in PREP_INPUT_CHECK/READDATA_EXP the error 

Could not find suitable DVDs for product NW required for the procedure.

The requested data carrier is not mounted on any of the mount points you entered.

Enter at least the mount point containing Export DVD for product NW.

I found note 2957413 - Incorrect DVD number in SUM phase: PREP_INPUT_CHECK/READDATA_EXP 

So I think I had to change configuration in Maintenance Planner - but I am not sure.

Can you help me out?

Best Regards

Christoph Greiner

entry.title: How to find Content Server data store
entry.content:
Hello Team,

We have ECC 6 with EHP 7 SP12 system and one Content server (Database is MaxDB). 

All the PDF, JPG files are stored into Content server this is working since last 5 yeas, now we have a new requirement to store all other data also move to Content server, for that management is asking us, month wise how much data will be store into Content server and what will be size of each document.

 

We found the table TOA01 tables, which is show number of data store into Content server, but we are not able to find the size of the data. 

Please help us, is there any query in ECC end to get the data as well as size of each document. 

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Is ASE License going to be extended for SAP NW AS ABAP Developer Edition 7.52 (NPL) from 2025?
entry.content:
The current ASE license provided on the following download page is going to expire on March 31st, 2025.

https://developers.sap.com/trials-downloads.html?search=7.52

Is there any extension planned for this ASE license? If so, where can it be found?

If not, what are the other options to run a local trial SAP system for ABAP learning purposes?

entry.title: Frage zu Note 3458956: Integration Leistungsgruppen in BW-Healthcare-Content
entry.content:
Die Note 3458956 beschreibt die Integration der Leistungsgruppen für die Erstellung des §21-Datensatzes:

Mit den Support Packages im März 2025 wurden Funktionen/Anpassungen zur Verfügung gestellt, damit

  • die Stammdaten der Leistungsgruppen im System hinterlegt werden können,
  • das Programm RNAP21K01 dazu in der Lage ist, die beiden neuen Dateien KRANKENHAUSSTRUKTUR_LEISTUNGSGRUPPEN und ARZTQUALIFIKATION_LEISTUNGSGRUPPEN erstellen zu können und
  • das Programm RNAP21F01 dazu in der Lage ist, in der Datei FALL die Spalten LG-Bezug und Leistungsgruppe erstellen zu können.

Für uns ergeben sich die Frage: Wird es eine Integration der Leistungsgruppen in den BW-Healthcare-Content geben? Wann wird damit zu rechnen sein?

entry.title: Are necessary to stop ASE server and replication in order to DUMP and DISK RESIZE in ASE?
entry.content:
Issue : 

 

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

 

ASE @Site1
##
00:0003:00000:00025:2024/10/29 22:43:08.03 server  Error: 1105, Severity: 17, State: 2
00:0003:00000:00025:2024/10/29 22:43:08.08 server  Can't allocate space for object 'js_output' in database 'sybmgmtdb' because 'default' segment is full/has no free extents. If you ran out of space in syslogs, dump the transaction log. Otherwise, use ALTER DATABASE to increase the size of the segment.
...
00:0003:00000:00019:2025/03/12 14:45:03.83 server  Error: 1105, Severity: 17, State: 2
00:0003:00000:00019:2025/03/12 14:45:03.83 server  Can't allocate space for object 'js_history' in database 'sybmgmtdb' because 'default' segment is full/has no free extents. If you ran out of space in syslogs, dump the transaction log. Otherwise, use ALTER DATABASE to increase the size of the segment.
00:0003:00000:00019:2025/03/12 14:45:03.83 kernel  Job Scheduler (js__exec_handler): Exception 3602 raised.
00:0003:00000:00019:2025/03/12 14:45:03.83 kernel  Job Scheduler got exception for execution token 1.
##

 

Our actions for this problem: 

 

1.Take the backup of sybmgmtdb database in primary Site1 node.

 

dump database sybmgmtdb to "/path/sybmgmtdb.dmp"

 

If we run it when primary DB, application and Replication is online and running then should it be a problem ?

 

OR 

 

2.

 

Check database current log devices:

 

sp_helpdb <SID>
go

 

To resize an existing log device:

 

use master
go
disk resize name = '<existing_log_device_name>', size = '<size in GB>G'  -- size is what is being added, not the total target size of the device
go
alter database <dbname> log on <existing_log_device_name> = '<size in GB>G' 
go

 

If we run it when primary DB, application and Replication is online and running then should it be a problem ?

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Native driver not recognised
entry.content:
Hello,

I want to update my ADS system. Right when starting SUM I get the following error message:

 

I checked, and the driver is installed:

I also checked that I unpacked and started SUM with the SIDADM user as this caused some problems in the past.

Do you know what I need to check or edit to get SUM to use the driver?

I don't want to change the whole system to this driver, as ADS is using the SAP Standard driver.
